name: Serviceability
description: Customer wants to check whether Virgin Media services are available at a specific address or postcode — they may be a new customer checking before signing up, or an existing customer checking coverage at a potential new address. This is a coverage and availability check, not a request to move services or purchase a product.

sampleUtterances.utterance: Can I get Virgin Media at my address?
Do you cover {postcodeSlot} ?
Check if Virgin Media is available at {postcodeSlot}
Is broadband available in my area?
Are your services available at {postcodeSlot} ?
I want to check if you cover a specific postcode
Can I get fibre broadband where I live?
Do you provide services to {postcodeSlot} ?
I'm thinking of moving to {postcodeSlot} — do you cover that area?
Is my street covered by Virgin Media?
The address isn't coming up when I check availability
I've checked your website and my postcode doesn't seem to be listed
Can you tell me if {postcodeSlot} has Virgin Media?
What services can I get at {postcodeSlot} ?
Is my new address covered by you?
I'm not sure if Virgin covers my area — can you check?
Do you have cable in {postcodeSlot} ?
Check availability for my postcode
My neighbour has Virgin but I was told I can't get it — can you check {postcodeSlot} ?
availability check
